title: Integrate PostHog Feature Flags for Premium Integrations
acceptance_criteria: PostHog feature flags are integrated into the DataTools Pro app
Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau features are hidden by default in the left toolbar
Features become visible when their corresponding PostHog feature flag is enabled
User identity is sent to PostHog for per-customer targeting
Feature flags can be toggled per user from the PostHog dashboard
ux_changes: Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau toolbar items are conditionally shown based on PostHog feature flag state.
middleware_changes: PostHog PHP SDK initialized on authentication. User identity sent via PostHog::identify(). Feature flag checks added for premium integration toolbar items.
implementation_notes: PostHog SDK is initialized with the app's API key and host from services config. User identity (id, email, name) is declared during authentication. Three feature flags were created in the PostHog dashboard for Snowflake, HubSpot, and Tableau. Per-customer targeting is possible by attaching user identities.
comment_summary: Developer implemented three PostHog feature flags, integrated the SDK with user identity, and asked whether flags should target specific customers or all users.
